name: get_themes
description: Fetches available themes. Call this when the user describes visual styling (e.g., 'professional', 'colorful', 'modern', 'cute') or explicitly requests a theme. Skip this tool if the user makes no mention of themes or styling - Gamma's default theme works well. Query by name if the user references a specific theme; otherwise fetch the full list and match tone/color keywords to user preferences and topic.

name.description: Search themes by name (optional, only include when user specifically references a theme by name)
